ddls:
CREATE TABLE "calls" (
  "call_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each call */,
  "caller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the caller */,
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the receiver */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the call was made */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the call was made */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the call was made */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the call in seconds */,
  "call_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the call type */,
  "call_purpose_id" INTEGER /* ID of the call purpose */,
  "call_outcome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the call outcome */,
  "call_tag_id" INTEGER /* ID of the call tag */,
  "call_start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the call */,
  "call_end_time" TEXT /* End time of the call */,
  "call_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the call */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the call (city, country) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calls_call_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("call_type_id") REFERENCES call_types ("call_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calls_receiver_id FOREIGN KEY ("receiver_id") REFERENCES receivers ("receiver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calls_call_tag_id FOREIGN KEY ("call_tag_id") REFERENCES call_tags ("call_tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calls_call_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("call_outcome_id") REFERENCES call_outcomes ("call_outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calls_call_purpose_id FOREIGN KEY ("call_purpose_id") REFERENCES call_purposes ("call_purpose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calls_caller_id FOREIGN KEY ("caller_id") REFERENCES callers ("caller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "callers" (
  "caller_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each caller */,
  "caller_name" TEXT /* Name of the caller */,
  "caller_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the caller */,
  "caller_email" TEXT /* Email address of the caller */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the caller */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the caller registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the caller (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("caller_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "receivers" (
  "receiver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each receiver */,
  "receiver_name" TEXT /* Name of the receiver */,
  "receiver_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the receiver */,
  "receiver_email" TEXT /* Email address of the receiver */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the receiver */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the receiver registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the receiver (active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("receiver_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "call_types" (
  "call_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each call type */,
  "call_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the call type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the call type */,
  "rate" TEXT /* Rate per minute for the call type */,
  "is_prepaid" INTEGER /* Indicates if the call type is prepaid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "call_purposes" (
  "call_purpose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each call purpose */,
  "call_purpose_name" TEXT /* Name of the call purpose */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the call purpose */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the call purpose (1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_purpose_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "call_outcomes" (
  "call_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each call outcome */,
  "call_outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the call outcome */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the call outcome */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "call_tags" (
  "call_tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each call tag */,
  "call_tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the call tag */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the call tag */,
  "is_important" INTEGER /* Indicates if the call tag is important */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("call_tag_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "call_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "call_id" INTEGER /* ID of the call the comment is associated with */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is private */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_call_comments_call_id FOREIGN KEY ("call_id") REFERENCES calls ("call_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_call_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "call_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "call_id" INTEGER /* ID of the call the rating is associated with */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given to the call (1-5 stars) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who gave the rating */,
  "is_anonymous" INTEGER /* Indicates if the rating is anonymous */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_call_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_call_ratings_call_id FOREIGN KEY ("call_id") REFERENCES calls ("call_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, sales, support) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the user's last activity */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user's account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the call data */,
  "call_id" INTEGER /* ID of the call being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the call data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_call_id FOREIGN KEY ("call_id") REFERENCES calls ("call_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user exporting the call data */,
  "call_id" INTEGER /* ID of the call being exported */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date the call data was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the exported file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the exported file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_call_id FOREIGN KEY ("call_id") REFERENCES calls ("call_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "import_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user importing the call data */,
  "call_id" INTEGER /* ID of the call being imported */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date the call data was imported */,
  "import_format" TEXT /* Format of the imported data (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the imported file */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the imported file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("import_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_call_id FOREIGN KEY ("call_id") REFERENCES calls ("call_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
